creator: wgodfrey@ena.com
text:
Hello, I am checking to see if you need anything else from my server or
if the problem was discovered.  Sorry, I couldn't see something obvious
in the NFS code to cause that (it would have to be real obvious for me
to see it :-) ).  I am just sending this because I will soon need to
load another OS on the server very soon.  If you would like access to
the system or discuss how I am replicating the error, please let me know
soon.

 

Thanks!

 

Weldon Godfrey

Sr. Systems Engineer

Education Networks of America

615-312-6060

866-615-1101x6060

 

________________________________

From: Weldon Godfrey 
Sent: Friday, July 11, 2008 2:25 PM
To: 'bug-followup@FreeBSD.org'; 'bra@fsn.hu'
Subject: Re: kern/124280: [nfs] [panic] FreeBSD 7/amd64 STABLE crash

 

Used snapshot of STABLE on July 7, re-tested...problem still exists.

 

Weldon
